MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$"Prefer channel for remaining batch after file=${item.displayName} reason=${result.message}"
MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$"Preflight finished in ${SystemClock.elapsedRealtime() - preflightStartMs}ms conflicts=${conflicts.size} transfer=${itemsToTransfer.size}"
MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$"Stop fresh HTTP retries after repeated unreachable endpoint file=${item.displayName} retries=$currentRetryCount"

MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$"Strategy plan wifiAvailable=${selectionContext.wifiAvailable} preferSharedHttp=${selectionContext.preferSharedHttpForBatch} counts=$strategyCounts"
MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$"Wi-Fi required for this transfer batch. Connect the watch to the same Wi-Fi or to this phone’s hotspot."
MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$message = "${HttpTransferServer.RESULT_HTTP_RECONNECT_TIMEOUT_PREFIX} detail=Watch did not answer after reconnect for ${item.displayName}"
MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$uiUpdater.update(0f, "Skipped ${conflicts.size} file(s) already on watch. Transferring ${itemsToTransfer.size}…")
MaxLineLength:BatchTransferRunner.kt$BatchTransferRunner$val

MaxLineLength:ChannelClientStrategy.kt$ChannelClientStrategy$"Metrics file=${metadata.displayFileName} open=${openMs}ms stream=${streamOpenMs}ms copy=${copyMs}ms ack=${ackWaitMs}ms total=${SystemClock.elapsedRealtime() - totalStartMs}ms"
MaxLineLength:ChannelClientStrategy.kt$ChannelClientStrategy$"Prewarm attempt $attempt failed file=${metadata.displayFileName} msg=${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}"
MaxLineLength:FileExistenceChecker.kt$FileExistenceChecker$"Batch exists check returned ${result.size}/${fileNames.size} items for id=$requestId; falling back"
MaxLineLength:FileExistenceChecker.kt$FileExistenceChecker$PhoneTransferDiagnostics.warn("Exists", "Batch check timeout requestId=$requestId timeoutMs=$timeoutMs")

MaxLineLength:FilePickerScreen.Dialogs.kt$"Recording is active on the phone. Stop when you are done and an email draft will open for Glancemap@protonmail.com.\n\nCaptured lines: ${debugCaptureState.bufferedLines}"
MaxLineLength:FilePickerScreen.Dialogs.kt$Text("• Choose the area source: Auto from watch map, Choose refuges.info region, or Enter BBox manually.")
MaxLineLength:FilePickerScreen.Dialogs.kt$Text("• For best speed and reliability, keep phone and watch on the same Wi-Fi network or on the phone hotspot.")

MaxLineLength:FilePickerScreen.Dialogs.kt$Text("• If a transfer stops or stalls, send the same file again. It usually resumes from the partial file already on the watch instead of restarting from zero.")
MaxLineLength:FilePickerScreen.Dialogs.kt$Text("• The watch screen does not need to stay on, but keeping the app open helps more than keeping the display awake.")

MaxLineLength:FilePickerScreen.Dialogs.kt$append("This records companion app transfer logs on the phone. Start it before reproducing a long transfer issue, then stop it to open an email draft to Glancemap@protonmail.com.")
MaxLineLength:FileTransferService.kt$FileTransferService$"Ignoring watch status id=$transferId active=$currentTransferId phase=${json.optString("phase", "")}"
MaxLineLength:FileTransferService.kt$FileTransferService$is PhoneDataLayerEvent.BatchExistsResult -> existenceChecker.handleBatchExistsResult(event.payload)
MaxLineLength:FileTransferService.kt$FileTransferService$is PhoneDataLayerEvent.MapListResult -> installedMapsRequester.handleMapListResult(event.payload)

MaxLineLength:GpxWaypointPoiImporter.kt$GpxWaypointPoiImporter.Companion$pattern = "^(turn|continue|keep|bear|head|take|follow|arrive|destination|u[- ]?turn|roundabout|at the roundabout|tournez|continuer|prenez|suivre|arrivee|abbiegen|weiter|nehmen|ziel|svolta|continua|prendi|arrivo|gire|tome|llegada)\\b"

MaxLineLength:HttpTransferServer.kt$HttpTransferServer$"Stall detected file=$displayFileName idle=${idleMs}ms timeoutMs=$stallTimeoutMs sent=$currentSent"
